title: CLAUDE.md — misc.tutorials
text: misc.tutorials R package “normal” (post-infrastructure) learnr tutorials. governed base tutorial guide adds specific package .

title: CLAUDE.md — misc.tutorials
text: tutorials inherit base tutorial guide — default contract authoring normal data science tutorial ecosystem, claude-md/tutorials/CLAUDE.md PPBDS/ai-rules repo (locally: ../ai-rules/claude-md/tutorials/CLAUDE.md). Read working tutorial . source truth everything common tutorials: AI-era philosophy — students create artifacts prompting AI agent, typing code learnr exercise chunks; workflow — student work lives analysis.qmd; render quarto render bash terminal view result via Live Server; exercise rhythm, question_text() question types, knowledge-drop discipline, CP/CR show_file() evidence; echo = FALSE, test-chunk discipline, code-chunk labeling, setup-chunk skeleton, data handling, formatting conventions. misc.tutorials one packages base guide governs default — exception (vscode.tutorials tutorial.helpers). Precedence. workflow shared conventions, base guide wins. misc.tutorials-specific content file wins. departure base guide must explicit, --record override stated — never silent difference. (base guide already carries Choosing topics (misc.tutorials-specific) section; file repeat .)

title: CLAUDE.md — misc.tutorials
text: collection tutorials covering material two companion texts: R Data Science (2e) — r4ds-1 … r4ds-5 tutorials. Analyzing US Census Data Kyle Walker — census tutorial. organizing theme storage technology. tutorial sources data different sort storage — delimited files, spreadsheets, databases, Arrow files, spatial formats, web APIs — works data using tidyverse. storage technology spine tutorial; subject-area domain (music, cheese/wine, baby names/flights, FIFA/NBA, earthquakes, census demographics) chosen suit . division R Data Science material five tutorials (r4ds-1 … r4ds-5) reasonable arbitrary — material split fewer. Treat count convenience, fixed boundary, deciding whether split long tutorial (see TODO.txt r4ds-4) merge two short ones.

title: CLAUDE.md — misc.tutorials
text: misc.tutorials’ content model — picks tutorial’s subject. base guide routes topic selection project; routed section. projects’ models differ (Primer fixes topics four Cardinal Virtues), lives , base guide. Tutorials organized around storage technologies (spine — see ) paired prominent data sources real data science domains: US Census data, baseball, stock data, Bitcoin, subject areas students learn analysts actually use. adding tutorial, pick storage technology yet covered (meaningfully different facet one), choose domain suits , follow base guide’s structure. tutorial teach: gold-standard data sources area. main R packages, APIs, file formats, vocabulary students mention AI. Common data patterns, data quality issues, standard analytical questions domain. reproducible workflow ends small published Quarto artifact. Prefer datasets hide discoverable anomaly. best data rich enough simple analysis looks fine misses something, leaves clues something , rewards step — usually plot — reveals explains mystery. r4ds-1 Billboard data exemplar: time-series plot song’s weekly ranking exposes strange discontinuity around week 20. Actively search datasets feature choosing topics; generally means reaching richer / larger datasets rather small, clean ones. (See base guide’s Analysis path build discovery exercise sequence. data choices tutorials still discussion.)

title: CLAUDE.md — misc.tutorials
text: base guide prefers stable source copies inst/extdata/<tutorial>/ says avoid inst/tutorials/<name>/data/ new tutorials unless learnr runtime reason. current state package, migrated vscode.tutorials, mixed converge toward base-guide convention: r4ds-1 follows guide: test chunk reads ../../extdata/r4ds-1/music.csv (inst/extdata/r4ds-1/), student-facing download URL points file GitHub. r4ds-2 … r4ds-5 census (yet): test chunks read local data/ directory via relative paths (read_excel("data/wine.xlsx"), open_dataset("data/game.parquet"), read_rds("data/age_ca.rds")). resolve tutorial knits folder working directory. New work add data inst/extdata/<tutorial>/ reference ../../extdata/<tutorial>/<file>, matching r4ds-1. Treat local-data/ tutorials legacy migrate, pattern copy.

title: CLAUDE.md — misc.tutorials
text: tutorial data files large (duckdb, parquet, geojson run multiple MB ; package ~48 MB disk). .Rbuildignore keeps commented-rule — — uncommented building tarball CRAN, strip data/ directories. R CMD check still report package large measures unpacked source, compressed .tar.gz CRAN actually evaluates; size NOTE expected. (See TODO.txt open question .Rbuildignore doesn’t seem shrink checked size.) test chunks depend data directories skip_on_cran() reason (see tests/testthat/test-tutorials.R).

title: CLAUDE.md — misc.tutorials
text: Per base guide, every package library()-ed tutorial must listed DESCRIPTION (Imports Suggests) GitHub Actions R CMD check fails. package keeps tutorial.helpers utils Imports; every tutorial-specific package (arrow, DBI, duckdb, readxl, sf, tidycensus, leaflet, plotly, …) lives Suggests. new tutorial adds library, add Suggests.

title: CLAUDE.md — misc.tutorials
text: Standard base-guide checks apply (rmarkdown::render() quick syntax pass, devtools::check() PR, learnr::run_tutorial() student view). devtools::check() may report size NOTE — see CRAN / build size .

title: CLAUDE.md — misc.tutorials
text: Active TODOs live TODO.txt (authoring conventions, r4ds-4 case_when() coercion warning, r4ds-4 length / r4ds-5 compile time, display options, new-tutorial ideas). Consult starting non-trivial work, keep current.

text: recommended way launch tutorials R Tutorials extension VS Code, lists every installed tutorial lets start one click. backup, can launch tutorial R console learnr::run_tutorial(), providing short name tutorial package name.

title: Tutorials for R for Data Science and US Census Data
text: tutorials cover material R Data Science (2e) (R4DS) Hadley Wickham, Mine Çetinkaya-Rundel, Garrett Grolemund. five related tutorials package: r4ds-1, r4ds-2, r4ds-3, r4ds-4, r4ds-5. Different tutorials cover different chapters book follows.

title: Miscellaneous Tutorials — misc.tutorials-package
text: misc.tutorials package provides interactive tutorials two main categories: R Data Science fundamentals US Census data analysis. R Data Science tutorials based R Data Science (2e) Hadley Wickham, Mine Çetinkaya-Rundel, Garrett Grolemund. Census tutorial draws Analyzing US Census Data: Methods, Maps, Models R Kyle Walker.

title: Miscellaneous Tutorials — misc.tutorials-package
text: collection interactive tutorials covering R Data Science essentials US Census data analysis. package makes extensive use tools tutorial.helpers package.

title: Miscellaneous Tutorials — misc.tutorials-package
text: package includes five r4ds tutorials (r4ds-1 r4ds-5). organization differs book: tutorial begins sourcing data different sort storage technology working data. r4ds-1: Data import, visualization, transformation, tidying (delimited files) r4ds-2: Spreadsheets, layers, exploratory data analysis, communication r4ds-3: Databases, logical vectors, numbers, strings, regular expressions r4ds-4: Arrow, factors, dates times, missing values, joins r4ds-5: Hierarchical data, web scraping, functions, iteration

title: Miscellaneous Tutorials — misc.tutorials-package
text: census tutorial covers working US Census data using tidycensus package, walking case studies income, educational attainment, median age, including choropleth maps drawn ggplot2.

title: Miscellaneous Tutorials — misc.tutorials-package
text: run tutorial, use: learnr::run_tutorial(name = "short_tutorial_name", package = "misc.tutorials") Available tutorial names : r4ds-1, r4ds-2, r4ds-3, r4ds-4, r4ds-5, census.
